checks.description: Repo contains the loop engineering guide, checklist, schema, and template.
checks.pass_condition: All required standard files and template directory exist.

checks.description: Each loop states why a loop is needed instead of a one-shot script or manual checklist.
checks.pass_condition: Justification names recurrence, measurable value, and why state improves future attempts.

checks.description: Each loop has an explicit trigger.
checks.pass_condition: Trigger source and valid input contract are defined.

checks.description: Execution has a bounded skill, allowed tools, forbidden actions, and output contract.
checks.pass_condition: Agent cannot expand scope without editing config.
Verifier command can run separately from the agent.

checks.description: Success criteria use deterministic, numeric, or bounded semantic checks where possible.
checks.pass_condition: Tier is 1, 2, or 3 unless explicitly documented as human review.

checks.description: Loop writes persistent state to repo-controlled or configured storage.
checks.pass_condition: State directory exists and write policy defines what gets recorded.

checks.description: Attempt history records inputs, outputs, verification, failures, and next adjustment.
checks.pass_condition: Attempt records include timestamp, result, verifier output, and next adjustment.

checks.description: Loop has stop conditions for max attempts, budget, repeated failure, and missing input.
checks.pass_condition: At least max_attempts and one budget or repeated-failure stop condition are defined.

checks.description: Loop limits token, money, time, API, or compute usage.
checks.pass_condition: At least one budget is defined with unit, limit, and stop threshold.

checks.description: Failure response logs evidence and stops or escalates instead of thrashing.
checks.pass_condition: Repeated failures stop the loop and produce actionable evidence.

how_to_verify: Inspect config rollback block or README
checks.pass_condition: Rollback identifies backup path, git command, or restore procedure.

checks.description: Loop has owner, status, and promotion level.
checks.pass_condition: Owner, status, and lifecycle stage are present.

checks.description: Success criteria avoid vague phrases without measurable translation.
how_to_verify: Search config and README for better/good/clean/improve without concrete checks
checks.pass_condition: Subjective goals are translated into explicit checks.

checks.description: Loop does not depend on chat history as operational memory.
how_to_verify: Inspect skill.md and config state block
checks.pass_condition: Operational memory is persisted to files/database, not chat only.
